description: Brand_Allowlist (R2.2/R2.3/R2.4, R10.2). The small, reviewed set of single files permitted to contain the legacy brand strings MIHAS / KATC / Mukuba / Kalulushi and legacy MIHAS domains. Every other file under apps/admissions/src, apps/admissions/index.html, backend/apps, and backend/config is scanned by the brand drift guards (backend/tests/unit/test_brand_drift_guard.py and apps/admissions/tests/unit/brandDriftGuard.test.ts) and must NOT contain these strings. Paths are repo-root-relative and each entry names a SINGLE file (R2.3 — no whole-directory entries). Each entry is classified as exactly one of the four allowed classes (R2.2) and states why it cannot be removed yet. A new entry is a deliberate decision that the strings are legitimate tenant data, an allowlisted historical reference, named legacy-compatibility code with a guard, or a dev/PDF-preview fixture not reachable from official-download paths (R2.4) — never a reintroduced platform fallback.
classifications: named legacy-compatibility code with a guard
dev/PDF-preview fixture not reachable from official-download paths

allowlist.classification: seeded tenant data
allowlist.reason: Tenant seed fixture (R6.7): seeds the MIHAS RN, KATC COG, KATC EHT acceptance-letter document profiles as tenant rows. MIHAS/KATC are legitimate tenant data here, confined to this seed command. Cannot be removed: deleting the strings would break seeding the existing MIHAS/KATC tenant profiles.

allowlist.classification: seeded tenant data
allowlist.reason: Tenant branding seed command: seeds brand_name/full_name/colours/contacts/domains (incl. admissions@mihas.beanola.com, support@mihas.beanola.com, https://mihas.beanola.com) for the existing MIHAS/KATC tenants so official documents render styled. MIHAS/KATC are legitimate tenant fixture data here. Cannot be removed: required to seed the existing tenants' brand identity.

allowlist.classification: named legacy-compatibility code with a guard
allowlist.reason: Application-number resolver. MIHAS appears only behind the clearly-named, tested legacy single-tenant path (_LEGACY_INSTITUTION_CODE / _resolve_institution_code_legacy); the default flow uses the assigned institution code. Cannot be removed: legacy application numbers must stay resolvable for existing records (covered by the canonical-tenant drift guard).

allowlist.classification: historical archived document
allowlist.reason: Docstring example of the student-number format ('MIHAS/26/00001') — a historical sample reference in a docstring, not a runtime fallback. Cannot be removed without losing the documented historical format example.

allowlist.classification: historical archived document
allowlist.reason: Comment documenting the historical MIHAS/KATC application-number pair; the validator accepts any institution code with no hard-coded prefix. Cannot be removed: the comment records the historical format the validator must keep accepting.

allowlist.classification: named legacy-compatibility code with a guard
allowlist.reason: Comment noting legacy MIHAS- payment references stay matchable, plus the Lenco 'User-Agent: MIHAS/2.0' product token. New references use the BNL- prefix. Cannot be removed: changing the product token / dropping legacy-reference matching would break reconciliation of pre-existing payments.

allowlist.classification: named legacy-compatibility code with a guard
allowlist.reason: Comment noting legacy MIHAS- payment references remain matchable by value (backward compatibility). No new MIHAS- references are generated. Cannot be removed: existing payment records carry MIHAS- references that must stay matchable.

allowlist.classification: dev/PDF-preview fixture not reachable from official-download paths
allowlist.reason: Dev-only, non-official document preview harness with MIHAS/KATC sample fixtures. Route /dev/documents is import.meta.env.DEV-gated in App.tsx and tree-shaken from prod; not reachable from official-download paths (R6.3).

allowlist.classification: dev/PDF-preview fixture not reachable from official-download paths
allowlist.reason: Dev-only, non-official acceptance-letter preview harness with MIHAS/KATC sample fixtures. Route /dev/acceptance-letter is import.meta.env.DEV-gated and tree-shaken from prod; not reachable from official-download paths (R6.3).

allowlist.classification: dev/PDF-preview fixture not reachable from official-download paths
allowlist.reason: Client-side preview/draft acceptance profiles (MIHAS RN, KATC COG, KATC EHT). Preview/draft only; backend tenant profiles are the official source. The client @/lib/pdf barrel is unreachable from official-download paths (R6.3).

allowlist.classification: dev/PDF-preview fixture not reachable from official-download paths
allowlist.reason: Client preview/draft renderer docstring referencing the historical MIHAS/KATC official letters it reproduces. Preview/draft only, unreachable from official-download paths (R6.3).

allowlist.classification: dev/PDF-preview fixture not reachable from official-download paths
allowlist.reason: Client preview intake-schedule docstring referencing MIHAS/KATC's two annual intakes. Preview content only, unreachable from official-download paths (R6.3).

allowlist.classification: dev/PDF-preview fixture not reachable from official-download paths
allowlist.reason: Client preview receipt docstring referencing the MIHAS FINANCE OFFICE tagline. Preview content only, unreachable from official-download paths (R6.3).

allowlist.classification: dev/PDF-preview fixture not reachable from official-download paths
allowlist.reason: Client preview PDF type docstrings with MIHAS/KATC examples. Preview content only, unreachable from official-download paths (R6.3).

allowlist.classification: historical archived document
allowlist.reason: Historical documentation for the MIHAS-KATC client PDF document system. Archived doc describing the preview/draft PDF system; not active runtime code.

allowlist.classification: dev/PDF-preview fixture not reachable from official-download paths
allowlist.reason: Client preview PDF theme: MIHAS/KATC registered as preview tenant data, with info@mihas.edu.zm / info@katc.edu.zm tenant contacts. Unknown institutions fall back to a Beanola-generic preview; MIHAS is never silently rendered for an unknown school (R2.5). Preview-only, unreachable from official-download paths (R6.3).

allowlist.classification: dev/PDF-preview fixture not reachable from official-download paths
allowlist.reason: Client preview signature block referencing the shared MIHAS/KATC Managing Director signatory. Preview content only, unreachable from official-download paths (R6.3).

allowlist.classification: named legacy-compatibility code with a guard
allowlist.reason: Active code: 'Kalulushi' is a real Zambian town in the location dropdown option list — a brand-pattern false-positive (the word collides with the Kalulushi brand pattern), not a brand reference. Covered by the brand drift guard via this single-file entry. Cannot be removed: dropping the town would break the Zambian location picker.

allowlist.classification: named legacy-compatibility code with a guard
allowlist.reason: Active code: test-only env override global key (__MIHAS_IMPORT_META_ENV__) — a legacy internal identifier and brand-pattern false-positive, not user-facing brand. Covered by the brand drift guard via this single-file entry. Cannot be removed: tests rely on this override key name.
